reference: Hi, you have pain in the hip bones and a cold lower back even at night. Walking is pain-free once you get up, but changes in posture are painful. I would diagnose it as sacroiliitis and treat you with pain killers, local heat, and a back physiotherapy program.
text: Hi, you have pain in the hip bones and a pulled lower back, even at night. Walking is pain-free when you get up, but changes in posture are painful. I would diagnose it as sacroiliitis and treat you with painkillers, local heat, and a back physical therapy program.
